title: Busted Water Pipes
overview: A crime-fighting cop maintains a zero-crime rate and faces job loss, so he decides to fabricate a major case, unaware that actual grave robbers are targeting a treasure-filled tomb located directly beneath his police station.

trailers.title: BUSTED WATER PIPES (BAO SHUI GUAN) 爆水管 - Opens January 30th in select Canadian & US theaters!
